reason: The sync path fix is correct and complete. The daemon path is still broken: CompletedProcess.failure_reason is populated only from exit code in process_manager.rs, the RunnerEvent IPC channel has no failure_reason field, and reconcile_completed_processes.rs was not modified to look up workflow storage. Fix must either (a) load the persisted workflow by workflow_id in reconcile_completed_processes.rs and override failure_reason when workflow_status is Failed/Escalated and the loaded workflow.failure_reason contains POLICY_GATE_PREFIX, or (b) add failure_reason to the protocol RunnerEvent struct and emit workflow.failure_reason from workflow-runner/src/main.rs on runner_complete, then use it in completion_reason().

evidence.description: process_manager.rs:115-125 sets CompletedProcess.failure_reason to a generic exit-code string; never reads from workflow storage
workflow-runner/src/main.rs RunnerEvent struct has no failure_reason field; runner_complete event cannot carry the policy gate reason over stderr IPC
reconcile_completed_processes.rs unmodified — still just calls build_completion_reconciliation_plan(completed_processes) with no workflow storage lookup
Sync path (ops_workflow/execute.rs) correctly passes result.failure_reason.as_deref() — only the daemon subprocess path is broken
lifecycle_executor.rs correctly sets workflow.failure_reason = 'policy gate: ...' in storage — the information exists but is never retrieved on the daemon path

blocking_issues: Daemon execution path: CompletedProcess.failure_reason is set only from process exit code (process_manager.rs:115-125), never from persisted workflow state. The RunnerEvent IPC struct has no failure_reason field, so the policy gate reason is lost at the subprocess boundary. reconcile_completed_processes.rs does not load workflow storage by workflow_id. Result: task.blocked_reason = 'workflow runner failed: workflow runner exited unsuccessfully with status Some(1)' — is_policy_gate_block() returns false — retry guard is ineffective for daemon-dispatched runs.

reconcile_completed_processes.rs unmodified — still just calls build_completion_reconciliation_plan(completed_processes) with no workflow storage lookup
Sync path (ops_workflow/execute.rs) correctly passes result.failure_reason.as_deref() — only the daemon subprocess path is broken
lifecycle_executor.rs correctly sets workflow.failure_reason = 'policy gate: ...' in storage — the information exists but is never retrieved on the daemon path

payload.reason: The sync path fix is correct and complete. The daemon path is still broken: CompletedProcess.failure_reason is populated only from exit code in process_manager.rs, the RunnerEvent IPC channel has no failure_reason field, and reconcile_completed_processes.rs was not modified to look up workflow storage. Fix must either (a) load the persisted workflow by workflow_id in reconcile_completed_processes.rs and override failure_reason when workflow_status is Failed/Escalated and the loaded workflow.failure_reason contains POLICY_GATE_PREFIX, or (b) add failure_reason to the protocol RunnerEvent struct and emit workflow.failure_reason from workflow-runner/src/main.rs on runner_complete, then use it in completion_reason().
payload.review_summary: Sync path correctly fixed; daemon path structural gap (failure_reason lost at subprocess IPC boundary) not addressed. reconcile_completed_processes.rs and process_manager.rs were not modified. is_policy_gate_block() will return false for daemon-dispatched policy gate failures, allowing incorrect retries.
